title: missing table name with invalid column in join using (and problems after resolving it)
poc: SELECT * FROM test_a JOIN test_b USING (c);
key_bug_features: JOIN using an invalid column name
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE "sys"."test_c" ("id" SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, "value" VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL);
CREATE TABLE "sys"."test_d" ("id" SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, "value" FLOAT DEFAULT 0.0);
